# News-driven model brief — 2026-06-13

Headlines matched by transparent keyword rules; severities are PRIORS,
impacts are first-order model mechanics (incidence + linkages). The
human judges relevance. NOT investment advice.

## From chokepoint to crisis: The Strait of Hormuz and global oil markets - Brookings
*Mon, 08 Jun 2026 16:18:40 GMT* — [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqAFBVV95cUxNd2pWUm5VV2RFLTM1SlI4ZUFCb1FvTkczeWExQ3dTcEx2RUFRdmpUOEsyTHFVQUdsSmpZRURZZmxmbWwzMzFTaHBiSVNSRHVoei1ONC1QRlE0TjlpbUM3aGxYZTFxMTRURWV6Yl9EOG01Zmx1NkZRTEZSUDE2WEp6djhsZ0hneU1aZ09vOXFUeUhMclBrNVhGXzUxdUpzVlVicWE1YTNiTXI?oc=5)
Rule: crude-oil / Saudi Arabia / severity prior +20% — transit proxy on Gulf supply

```
CROSS-COMMODITY RIPPLE — Saudi Arabia crude-oil -20% (prior)
commodity    channel       via                          price Δ
----------------------------------------------------------------
crude-oil    direct        Saudi Arabia                    +11%  [+4..+191%]
wheat        input_cost    crude-oil price +11%             +1%

One first-order round through data/seed/linkages.yaml (byproduct /
substitution / input-cost); couplings are disputable seed-estimates.
[..] = the same shock across the seeded elasticity RANGES — when the
band is wide, the elasticities are doing the work, not the event.
```

_17 corroborating headline(s):_
- [Hormuz reopening could be OPEC’s undoing - Reuters](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxOZmdfVUZJbE5ORWIyZV9HYUhiTHRVOHMtZ1lOUFUwOXhiU2xzSWprczRMeUNESlJGUnNieGVnYlJZMG1LZG9WczRaaWptZEJJUUhpZHVDSTZhQ2tXYW0wNzhEZUdNQ0RIaFFIUExZYV9SMGFXZjQ0bVlseUNkRldYMTlWSDBjTWJoT2E5N3RnLWF4dHZWOFVDSXktc01WTmtwV0w5dk5IV1BiSDR5?oc=5)

## OPEC+ Approves Fourth Consecutive Output Hike - Mexico Business News
*Fri, 12 Jun 2026 05:34:32 GMT* — [source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxQV3REb09vUjRZY25BMVJ5T0tJUmd5aE5TRFM2WFNZcWxRWVpWTm9XMTQ0dURoZzc0T3NCUEJEVGhNeDRGMjJXeXlWMTVia0J1Zmg5aWpiYjBTa1hFRGN3TWQxM05DeUxfVEVVOTBWNkp0RERuY2IzM3dFZUFQR21INnhUVlV4UXlVcEl6dmk5Y3E?oc=5)

```
CROSS-COMMODITY RIPPLE — Saudi Arabia crude-oil -8% (prior)
commodity    channel       via                          price Δ
----------------------------------------------------------------
crude-oil    direct        Saudi Arabia                     +4%  [+2..+53%]
wheat        input_cost    crude-oil price +4%              +0%

One first-order round through data/seed/linkages.yaml (byproduct /
substitution / input-cost); couplings are disputable seed-estimates.
[..] = the same shock across the seeded elasticity RANGES — when the
band is wide, the elasticities are doing the work, not the event.
```

## The Democratic Republic of Congo’s Cobalt Export Ban Spells Trouble For The World, Puts EV Battery Supply A - News18
